image.title: BBC Weather - Forecast for Cardiff, GB

item.title: Today: Light Cloud, Minimum Temperature: 7°C (44°F) Maximum Temperature: 15°C (59°F)
item.description: Maximum Temperature: 15°C (59°F), Minimum Temperature: 7°C (44°F), Wind Direction: south-westerly, Wind Speed: 20mph, Visibility: Very Good, Pressure: 1010mb, Humidity: 67%, UV Risk: 3, Pollution: Low, Sunrise: 06:42 BST, Sunset: 19:50 BST

item.title: Sunday: Sunny Intervals, Minimum Temperature: 3°C (37°F) Maximum Temperature: 11°C (52°F)
item.description: Maximum Temperature: 11°C (52°F), Minimum Temperature: 3°C (37°F), Wind Direction: westerly, Wind Speed: 17mph, Visibility: Very Good, Pressure: 1018mb, Humidity: 61%, UV Risk: 5, Pollution: Low, Sunrise: 06:40 BST, Sunset: 19:52 BST

item.title: Monday: Sunny Intervals, Minimum Temperature: 5°C (41°F) Maximum Temperature: 14°C (57°F)
